name: Cefazolin
description: cephalosporin akọkọ-iran. aporo aporo obi akọkọ-akọkọ fun awọn akoran ọgbẹ to ṣe pataki ati prophylaxis iṣẹ abẹ. Iboju to dara giramu-rere pẹlu MSSA. Fun laarin 60 iṣẹju ti lila iṣẹ abẹ fun prophylaxis.
indications: Awọn àkóràn àsopọ asọ to ṣe pataki
dose: 1-2g IV / IM q8h. Ilana ti iṣẹ abẹ: 2g IV laarin awọn iṣẹju 60 ṣaaju lila. Tun 2g ti iṣẹ abẹ> 4 wakati.
window: Fun prophylaxis iṣẹ abẹ: fun laarin awọn iṣẹju 60 ti lila.
contraindications: Aleji penicillin ti o lewu (5-10% ifaseyin agbekọja)
warnings: Iṣe agbekọja pẹlu aleji penicillini: lo pẹlu iṣọra ni awọn alaisan ti ara korira penicillin.
Ṣatunṣe iwọn lilo ninu ailagbara kidirin.

pediatric.dose: 25-50 mg/kg IV/IM q8h (max 2g/iwọn lilo). Itọkasi: 30 mg / kg (max 2g) ṣaaju lila.
pediatric.note: Ailewu ati ikẹkọ daradara ni awọn itọju ọmọde.

obstetric.note: Ailewu ninu oyun ati lactation. aporo aporo obi ti o fẹ fun awọn ilana alaboyun.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / Surgical Prophylaxis
